siteBrand.name: Stoke Poges, Wexham & Fulmer Horticultural Society
siteBrand.tagline: Community horticulture, shows, planting, and local growing knowledge.
siteBrand.footerNote: Serving Stoke Poges, Wexham, and Fulmer growers, exhibitors, and visitors.

siteAssetPlan.inventory_notes: Derived from the live WordPress shell on 2026-03-23. The corrective shell pass ingests the centered masthead, homepage banner, the three homepage feature images, the homepage announcement image, and the current plant-sale poster locally so the shell no longer depends on the legacy host for its core structure.

masthead_banner.notes: Used as the first-pass masthead image because it is the key live-site banner asset.

home_hero.alt: Horticultural society garden border hero image
home_hero.notes: Locally ingested because it is the main live-site homepage banner image.

annual_show_banner.notes: Reserved banner slot for major seasonal promotion artwork once the annual-show asset pass is reviewed.

about.alt: Historic Stoke Poges, Wexham and Fulmer Horticultural Society committee photograph
about.notes: Derived from the WordPress export via the About page featured image (_thumbnail_id 36) and now ingested locally as part of the first reviewed hero-asset batch.

membership.alt: Visitors and members at the horticultural society annual show
membership.notes: Dedicated high-resolution membership hero installed locally so the rebuilt Membership page does not upscale the smaller homepage card image.

whats_on.alt: Band performing at a horticultural society event
whats_on.notes: Derived from the WordPress export via the What's On page featured image (_thumbnail_id 81) and now ingested locally as part of the first reviewed hero-asset batch.

home_notice.title: Special announcement
home_notice.body: Of interest to 16-30 year olds, particularly students and those involved in a horticultural project. Please see What's On for further information.
